# Artes Marciales Garraf
# https://artesmarcialesgarraf.es

## About
Artes Marciales Garraf is an independent local guide (in Spanish) about martial arts in the Garraf region (Barcelona, Spain). It is NOT a gym or academy: it is an editorial resource that explains each discipline, offers guidance by municipality, and helps visitors take their first step into martial arts training. Free, personalized orientation is available through the contact form.

## What this site covers
- Discipline guides: what each martial art is, real benefits, who it suits, what beginner classes look like
- Local guides for the municipalities of the Garraf comarca: Sitges, Vilanova i la Geltrú, Sant Pere de Ribes, Cubelles, Canyelles
- Audience-specific guides: children (from age 4), women, adult beginners
- Criteria for choosing a good martial arts school: instructor credentials, group levels, trial classes, contracts

## Disciplines covered
- Boxing (Boxeo)
- Karate
- MMA (Mixed Martial Arts)
- Kickboxing
- Muay Thai
- Brazilian Jiu Jitsu (BJJ)
- Judo
- Taekwondo
- Self-Defense (Defensa Personal), including women-focused programs
- Krav Maga

## Region covered
Comarca del Garraf, province of Barcelona, Spain:
- Sitges
- Vilanova i la Geltrú (comarca capital, largest sports offer)
- Sant Pere de Ribes
- Cubelles
- Canyelles

## Contact
- Email: contacto@artesmarcialesgarraf.es
- Contact form: https://artesmarcialesgarraf.es/contacto/

## Editorial principles
1. Independent guide: this site does not operate a gym and does not publish reviews, ratings or business data it cannot verify
2. Honest information only: no fabricated testimonials, instructors, schedules or prices
3. Local focus: content written for the Garraf comarca and its real geography
4. Free orientation: visitors can ask for personalized guidance at no cost
